title: Accessing large registers results in excessive compile-time burden (read_verilog)

features.name: large vector with variable-indexed self-referencing assignment
features.description: Code should include a vector register with size exceeding 2^20 elements, indexed by a wide variable, with self-referencing assignment in a sequential always block
features.snippet:
reg [1<<20:0] large_register;
always @(posedge clk) large_register[addr] <= (valid ? wr_bit : large_register[addr]);
